bio: Bruno is a bit of a legend around here! He is mostly known for making himself at home wherever he likes! He has been found on various floors of DG1 including someone's apartment. There is a Reddit post all about him. That said, when he was re-homed, he hated it...
location: When he isn't exploring inside an apartment block or restaurant, he is usually found outside (or inside) Carrefour Supermarket in Cluster Q.
